qualitative_description: DSI vs diameter slope is not distinguishable from zero (slope=0.0041 per log2(multiplier), p=0.8808, dsi_range_extremes=-0.0237); neither Schachter2010 nor passive filtering is supported.
t0030_comparison_note: t0030 (diameter sweep on t0022) reported dsi_primary pinned at ~1.000 across all seven multipliers because t0022's deterministic E-I driver zeroed null-direction firing, collapsing the primary-DSI dynamic range. t0024's AR(2) correlated stochastic bipolar release (rho=0.6) restores non-zero null firing, and the t0035 sweep observes a primary-DSI range of 0.680-0.808 (0.128 wide). Mechanism classification under the revived dynamic range: flat.
